rationale: A visible and overwhelming display of armored and air assets along the forward line will exploit the fragile defensive equilibrium and pressure Tethys psychologically.
Conducting large-scale, surprise drills on home soil reinforces readiness, boosts domestic morale, and signals resolve to both allies and adversaries.
Persistent surveillance of enemy positions will identify vulnerabilities in their stabilized frontline, preparing for future operational opportunities.

Given the moderate crisis level and signs of information warfare fracturing domestic cohesion, we must harden our critical infrastructure and information channels against foreign infiltration and manipulation.
To counter divisive narratives in diaspora communities and align with the neutral power’s peace initiative, we will launch a calibrated information campaign emphasizing stability and mutual interest.
Proactively identifying and neutralizing Tethys-linked assets within our borders will protect operational secrets and prevent exploitation of our fragile defensive equilibrium.
With international support at 62%, we can leverage coalition backing to impose a resource embargo on Tethys, amplifying economic pressure while staying below the threshold of severe retaliation.
Targeting key Tethysian defense and logistics firms will erode their war-sustaining capacity without triggering broad humanitarian fallout that could weaken coalition unity.
Engaging the neutral power in parallel trade talks incentivizes their continued diplomatic support and creates economic interdependence that bolsters our strategic position.
A visible demonstration of combat-ready forces near the front will exploit our defensive stability and signal unwavering resolve to resist further aggression.
Conducting large-scale drills will enhance readiness, boost troop morale, and signal internal cohesion amid rising social divisions.
Proactive intelligence gathering is critical to anticipate Novaris’s recalibrated strategy and prevent surprise offensives.
Given Novaris is recalibrating its strategy, strengthening our cyber defenses is critical to protect infrastructure and maintain resilience amid heightened threat of digital attacks.
Proactive counterintelligence will neutralize potential infiltration attempts exploiting social divisions within our diaspora and armed forces.
A targeted information campaign will amplify our diplomatic momentum by highlighting our defensive legitimacy and Novaris’ stalled aggression.
With international support at 62%, we can leverage coalition backing to impose coordinated economic sanctions that amplify pressure on Novaris without overextending our own economy.
By focusing on key individuals and sectors enabling Novaris’ war effort, we complement broader sanctions while minimizing collateral damage and maintaining precision in economic warfare.
Engaging neutral states in trade talks strengthens economic alliances and incentivizes deeper political alignment, reinforcing diplomatic momentum alongside our punitive measures.
Leveraging our strengthened diplomatic standing and neutral support, we launch a high-profile initiative to frame Tethys as the responsible defender and isolate Novaris in global forums.
Building on the neutral power’s peace proposal, we formalize engagement through established institutions to institutionalize pressure on Novaris and solidify legitimacy.
To soften divisions and reinforce soft power, we expand cultural exchanges with key neutrals, strengthening long-term alliances and countering Novaris’ information narratives.
